validator_prompt: Review whether the report grounds claims in MailWhere/OfficeWhere files and gives a concrete Codex CLI skill/hook/agent integration plan.

architect_review.summary: Report is grounded in local MailWhere/OfficeWhere/Codex files, recommends a low-risk skill-first integration, and defers hooks/agents/MCP until boundaries are validated.
architect_review.approved_recommendation: Build a where-desk Codex skill with read-only helper scripts first; add lightweight routing/safety hooks and a where-researcher agent only after the script contract is validated.
key_risks: Packaged OfficeWhere uses a dynamic backend port, so MVP should require OFFICEWHERE_BASE_URL or add a discovery file later.
MailWhere currently lacks a stable export CLI/API, so direct SQLite reads should be treated as an interim bridge.
Raw mail body and source Office document mutation must remain out of scope.
